meta.author: You
meta.description: Local developer tools with intelligent GitHub automation (data generation, RAG, GitOps, CI/CD, and Cheat Sheets)

api.name: generate_data
api.description: Context-aware test data generator with validation and graceful error handling. V1 (Simple): Faker-based mock data. V2 (Advanced): Multi-entity generation with semantic analysis, constraint enforcement, and relationship integrity. Features: Input validation (rows: 1-100000, formats: json/csv), schema design error handling, constraint violation detection, foreign key integrity validation, and detailed error reporting with graceful degradation.

api.name: github_operation
api.description: Intelligent GitHub automation with natural language. Supports: list repos, create issues, commit files, create PRs. v0.8 features: fuzzy repo matching, AI commit messages from diffs, log-to-issue parsing (Python/JS/Java/Go), confidence-based safety gating.

query.description: Natural language description of the GitHub action (e.g., 'list my repos', 'create issue in backend about login bug', 'commit auth changes')

files.description: File list for commit message context

diff.description: Git diff for auto-generating Conventional Commit messages

error_log.description: Stack trace for intelligent issue creation with file/line extraction

session_id.description: Session ID for multi-turn conversation context

repo.description: Pre-specified repository (owner/repo) to skip fuzzy matching

available_files.description: List of currently uploaded files in the workspace with metadata (v0.8.1)

api.name: refine_prompt
api.description: Refines a user prompt into a detailed specification with optional tech-stack grounding. Iterative use: response.quality.prompt_grounding signals 'low'/'medium'/'high'; re-call with the fields listed in quality.suggested_inputs to improve grounding. Output data.chosen_stack splits detected tech into typed lists (languages, frameworks, libraries, services, databases). Supports manifest files: requirements.txt, package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, build.gradle(.kts), Gemfile, composer.json, *.csproj. Domains: code, image, rag, llm, general.

prompt.description: The user's original prompt to refine. Required, non-empty. Pass the raw prompt verbatim.

domain.description: Refinement domain. 'code' triggers tech-stack detection. 'image' produces Midjourney/SD prompts. 'rag' produces vector-search queries.

skill_level.description: Adjusts depth and assumed prior knowledge in the refined prompt.

file_context.description: Free-form text context. Prefer attached_files and project_files for stronger evidence. Sanitized before use.

conversation_history.description: Recent chat messages (last 5 considered). Weak evidence by default (weight 0.4).

attached_files.description: Source code file contents (one per array element). Used to detect imported frameworks and existing classes/functions.

project_files.description: Dependency manifest files keyed by filename. Strongly recommended for 'code' domain. Supported: requirements.txt, package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml, pom.xml, build.gradle, build.gradle.kts, Gemfile, composer.json, *.csproj.

api.name: generate_cheatsheet
api.description: Generate a dynamic cheat sheet for a programming language based on skill level.

language.description: Programming language (e.g., python, javascript). Auto-detected if code_context is provided.

code_context.description: Optional code snippet to auto-detect language and context.

api.name: generate_changelog
api.description: Generate release notes and changelog from git history between tags or commits. Parses conventional commits and categories changes (features, fixes, docs, etc.).

to_tag.description: End tag or commit SHA (default: HEAD)

api.name: analyze_ci_failure
api.description: Analyze CI/CD pipeline failures and suggest fixes. Detects test failures, build errors, dependency issues, and timeouts. Auto-fix policy enforced for safe operations.

run_id.description: Workflow run ID (optional, defaults to latest failed run)

pr_number.description: PR number to analyze (optional, alternative to run_id)

api.name: scaffold_repository
api.description: Create new repository from template with CI/CD setup. Templates: fastapi, react, nextjs, microservice, docs. (Requires 'admin:org' scope for organization repos).

force.description: Force creation even if repository exists
